title: IntegrationAssembly
description: A Studio integration assembly representing the graphical integration logic composed of configurable components, mediation chains, and transformation mappings.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the assembly

descriptor.description: The display name of the assembly

assemblyName.description: The configured name of the assembly

deployedDateTime.description: The date and time the assembly was last deployed

components.description: The list of components configured in the assembly
